channel.title: Wisconsin Sports (Core Teams)
channel.description: Packers, Bucks, Brewers scores + UW Badgers scores & news.

item.title: UW News • Football: HOF CLASS OF 2026: ‘Big, big personality’ – The Bob Konovsky story
item.description: Bob Konovsky managed to cram a whole lot of living into a relatively short life.

item.title: UW News • Football: Wisconsin Athletics partners with Good Karma Brands for radio broadcast rights in Milwaukee area
item.description: Wisconsin Athletics and its exclusive multimedia rights holder, Learfield's Badger Sports Properties, announced today that Good Karma Brands has entered into a multi-year partnership to broadcast Badger sporting events in the Milwaukee market.

item.title: UW News • Men's Basketball: Wisconsin Athletics partners with Good Karma Brands for radio broadcast rights in Milwaukee area
item.description: Wisconsin Athletics and its exclusive multimedia rights holder, Learfield's Badger Sports Properties, announced today that Good Karma Brands has entered into a multi-year partnership to broadcast Badger sporting events in the Milwaukee market.

item.title: UW News • Women's Basketball: Wisconsin Athletics partners with Good Karma Brands for radio broadcast rights in Milwaukee area
item.description: Wisconsin Athletics and its exclusive multimedia rights holder, Learfield's Badger Sports Properties, announced today that Good Karma Brands has entered into a multi-year partnership to broadcast Badger sporting events in the Milwaukee market.

item.title: UW News • Volleyball: Wisconsin Athletics partners with Good Karma Brands for radio broadcast rights in Milwaukee area
item.description: Wisconsin Athletics and its exclusive multimedia rights holder, Learfield's Badger Sports Properties, announced today that Good Karma Brands has entered into a multi-year partnership to broadcast Badger sporting events in the Milwaukee market.

item.title: Brewers News: Aaron's 755th and final home run went quietly, but legacy remains for 50th anniversary
item.description: Aaron's 755th and final home run went quietly, but legacy remains for 50th anniversary

item.title: UW News • Men's Basketball: Three Badgers earn NABC Honors Court accolades
item.description: MADISON, Wis. – Three student-athletes from the Wisconsin men's basketball program were named to the 2025-26 NABC Honors Court, recognizing their academic and athletic excellence, selected by the National Association of Basketball Coaches.

item.title: UW News • Men's Basketball: Wisconsin to take on Villanova in Philly Hoops Showdown
item.description: MADISON, Wis. – The Wisconsin men's basketball program announced on Wednesday that it will take on Villanova in the Philly Hoops Showdown at Xfinity Mobile Arena in Philadelphia.

item.title: UW News • Men's Basketball: HOF CLASS OF 2026: "A Promise Kept' - The Sam Dekker story
UW News • Volleyball: Big Ten Volleyball Media Day Announced
item.description: MADISON, Wis. - The fifth annual Big Ten Volleyball Media Day will occur on August 3 in Chicago with Wisconsin volleyball's head coach Kelly Sheffield and athletes Grace Egan and Charlie Fuerbringer to attend at the Big Ten Network studies in Chicago.

item.title: Brewers News: Get Brewers.TV for low price of $54.99
item.description: Get Brewers.TV for low price of $54.99

item.title: UW News • Women's Basketball: HOF CLASS OF 2026: Side by side – The Janet Huff story
UW News • Football: Badgers reveal Lambeau Field alternate uniform
item.description: WIsconsin will wear special Under Armour uniforms for season opener against Notre Dame

item.title: UW News • Football: Wisconsin Athletics Announces Multi-Sport Jersey Patch Sponsorship with Culver’s
UW News • Men's Basketball: Wisconsin Athletics Announces Multi-Sport Jersey Patch Sponsorship with Culver’s
UW News • Men's Basketball: Boyd signs with Golden State Warriors
item.description: MADISON, Wis. – Wisconsin men's basketball standout Nick Boyd signed a deal with the Golden State Warriors on Thursday.

item.title: UW News • Volleyball: Volleyball Finalizes 2026 Roster with Konrad Signing
item.description: MADISON, Wis. – Head coach Kelly Sheffield finalizes the 2026-27 Wisconsin volleyball roster with the signing of libero/defensive specialist Alyssa Konrad.

item.title: UW News • Volleyball: Volleyball’s Champion Reclassifies for 2026-27
item.description: MADISON, Wis. – The highly touted volleyball Puerto Rican outside hitter, Decelise Champion, will join the Wisconsin volleyball team for the 2026-27 season, head coach Kelly Sheffield announced Friday.

item.title: UW News • Football: HOF CLASS OF 2026: 'Pound for pound' - The Chris Borland story
UW News • Women's Basketball: Home and away opponents set for 2026-27 Big Ten season
item.description: The Badgers will play an 18-game conference schedule featuring one home-and-home series

item.title: UW News • Football: Wisconsin adds Brown as football General Manager
item.description: Badgers add 25-year NFL front office veteran

item.title: UW News • Women's Basketball: Registration Open for Women's Basketball Annual Golf Outing
item.description: Sign up today for your first chance to meet the 2026-27 Wisconsin women's basketball team when the Badgers host the 31st-annual Wisconsin Women's Basketball Golf Outing on Monday, August 3 at University Ridge Golf Course. Fans and attendees will be able to interact and have pictures taken with members of the team, coaches and staff while enjoying a day on the links with a dinner and auction to follow.

item.title: UW News • Football: Badger Football Kids Combine set for June 17 in Green Bay
item.description: Wisconsin Football to host kids' activities at Titletown football field from 4-5:30 p.m.

item.title: UW News • Volleyball: Volleyball Announces Big Ten Schedule
item.description: MADISON, Wis. – Wisconsin volleyball and head coach Kelly Sheffield officially announce the Badgers 2026 Big Ten slate.

item.title: UW News • Football: Kickoff times and TV info released for select Badger games
item.description: Wisconsin will take on Minnesota on Black Friday in primetime

item.title: UW News • Football: City of Green Bay and Wisconsin Athletics reveal details for Badger Bash North
item.description: Downtown Green Bay will host slate of fan events on Saturday, Sept. 5 ahead of Wisconsin's season opener at Lambeau Field on Sept. 6

item.title: UW News • Men's Basketball: Wisconsin announces exciting Big Ten home opponents for 2026-27
item.description: MADISON, Wis. — The Big Ten opponents for Wisconsin men's basketball have been announced for next season and the home slate features an exciting lineup.

item.title: UW News • Men's Basketball: Wisconsin to take on Auburn in Nashville
item.description: MADISON, Wis. — The Wisconsin men's basketball team will head to the Music City next December as the Badgers are slated to take on Auburn in Nashville, Tennessee on Saturday, Dec. 19, the two programs announced on Tuesday.

item.title: UW News • Football: Kickoff time for season opener revealed
item.description: The 2026 season will kick off at 6:30 p.m. CT on Sunday, Sept. 6 against Notre Dame

item.title: UW News • Volleyball: Badgers Set to Serve Up a Storm This Season
item.description: MADISON, Wis. – Head coach Kelly Sheffield of the Wisconsin volleyball team and the Big Ten Conference announces it's complete 2026 schedule of opponents. The schedule is highlighted by 11 teams that finished in the Top 25 final rankings in 2025, and the inaugural Big Ten Tournament that will be held at Fishers Event Center in Fishers, Indiana.

item.title: UW News • Volleyball: 2026 Volleyball Season Tickets on Sale Now
item.description: Madison, Wis. – 2026 Wisconsin volleyball season tickets are available for order today! Don't miss out on your opportunity to keep the UW Field House tradition alive.

item.title: UW News • Women's Basketball: Wisconsin adds Julia Ford to women’s basketball staff
item.description: Ford brings seven years of collegiate experience, including stops at Grand Canyon and Missouri

item.title: UW News • Volleyball: Badgers blitz Huskies in final spring match
item.description: MADISON, Wis. - The Wisconsin volleyball team swept Northern Illinois (25-18, 25-18, 25-13) in its lone home match of the spring, cruising to a 3-0 victory behind a quality team effort at the UW Field House on Friday night.

item.title: UW News • Men's Basketball: Riddle to join Badgers next season
item.description: MADISON, Wis. – The Wisconsin men's basketball program announced on Thursday that Isaac Riddle will join the program next fall.

item.title: UW News • Men's Basketball: Wisconsin ranks No. 12 in latest Learfield Directors' Cup standings
item.description: Following the winter sports season, Wisconsin ranks No. 12 in the latest Division I Learfield Directors' Cup standings, presented by the National Association of Collegiate Directors of Athletics (NACDA) and LEARFIELD.

item.title: UW News • Women's Basketball: Badgers add SoCon Player of the Year Caia Elisaldez to 2026–27 roster
item.description: High-scoring transfer guard arrives from Chattanooga

item.title: UW News • Volleyball: Badgers return home to wrap up spring play
item.description: MADISON, Wis. - The Wisconsin volleyball team is set to return to the UW Field House for the first time this spring to take on Northern Illinois on Friday, April 24, at 6:00 p.m. CT to complete its 2026 spring schedule.

item.title: UW News • Volleyball: Volleyball Adds Bardaro to Roster
item.description: MADISON, Wis. – The Wisconsin volleyball team has added libero Anna Bardaro from Cittadella, Italy, announced by head coach Kelly Sheffield.

item.title: UW News • Women's Basketball: UW Athletic Board approves coaches contracts
item.description: The UW Athletic Board met Wednesday afternoon and approved the following recommendations of the UW Department of Athletics regarding contracts for various sports head coaches.

item.title: UW News • Women's Basketball: Belgian guard Alicia Courthiau joins Wisconsin
item.description: Freshman brings EuroCup and national team experience to the Badgers

item.title: UW News • Women's Basketball: Badgers sign NEC Player of the Year Kadidia Toure
item.description: One of the nation's most productive forwards brings veteran leadership to Madison

item.title: UW News • Women's Basketball: Wisconsin adds in-state standout Teagan Mallegni
item.description: Transfer guard and top in-state recruit heads home to Wisconsin after two years at Iowa

item.title: Brewers News: Solve today's Brewers trivia puzzle
item.description: Solve today's Brewers trivia puzzle

item.title: Brewers News: Brewers' Top 30 Prospects list
item.description: Who do the Brewers have in the pipeline? Get scouting reports, video, stats, projected ETAs and more for Milwaukee's Top 30 Prospects.
